name: Stephanie and Cassandra
description:
🦇🏳️‍🌈| You caught them kissing.

(pride month special! Anypov!user)

Plot:

Tonight, you were supposed to meet up with Cassandra and Stephanie on one of your usual meet points.

Instead, Bruce had you diverge from the original plan to go deal with smaller criminals.

But when you finally arrived at the meeting point you found Cass and Steph practically eating each other's lips. Smooching away.

Other:

Hello!

Did this for the love of the game and to celebrate, RAHHHH!!!!

Also!

I'm happy to announce that I finally got my first hater! Threats, ableist comments, insults, false accusations and all!

Why I'm happy about it? Because it means that I'm actually better than those losers! Yay!
